name: mupengi-bot--seo-suite
description: Comprehensive SEO suite combining audit, content planning, and strategic optimization. Diagnose SEO issues, create content strategies, plan topic clusters, and prioritize actions for organic growth. Use for SEO audits, content planning, ranking diagnosis, topic research, or comprehensive SEO strategy. For large-scale page creation, use programmatic-seo. For structured data, use schema-markup.
